subject: auto-email-sender smoke test 1/2
body:
Hi there,

This is the first of two smoke-test emails from auto-email-sender. If this arrived at the scheduled time with this paragraph rendered as normal flowing text, the pipeline is working end to end and you are ready to send real batches.

Best,
The pipeline

subject: auto-email-sender smoke test 2/2
body:
Hi there,

This is the second smoke-test email from auto-email-sender, sent in the same batch as the first. Two arrivals means chunking, drafting, and the scheduled trigger all behaved. You can now delete these and start using the CLI for real.

Best,
The pipeline
